overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a 1960s-era open world game showing a character in a tan suit running across a rainy urban intersection. The setting features historic New Orleans-style shotgun houses, period-appropriate vehicles, and wet streets reflecting the overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet multi-lane intersection with marked crosswalk

events.description: silver vintage sedan approaches from the right and passes in front of ego
green vintage sedan approaches rapidly from the right, requiring evasion

agents.ego_description: running across the crosswalk while dodging oncoming traffic from the right

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving through the intersection, passing in front of the character

entered.detail: white painted zebra crossing lines on wet asphalt
single-story pink brick shotgun house with gabled roof across the intersection
single-story green painted commercial building with large windows
two-story white wooden shotgun house with blue shutters and covered porch
tall wooden power pole with multiple crossbars and hanging wires
1960s era silver sedan with chrome detailing approaching the intersection
weathered wooden fence lining the sidewalk behind the starting position

segments.scene_description: The character begins crossing a wet multi-lane intersection at dusk, running across white crosswalk lines while avoiding period vehicles. Historic shotgun houses line the far side of the street, with a distinctive white house with blue shutters visible on the right. A silver vintage sedan passes in front of the character, followed by a green sedan approaching rapidly from the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: center of intersection with active traffic from multiple directions

events.description: green vintage sedan passes extremely close behind ego, nearly causing collision
ego slows slightly while approaching the far curb to time the crossing

agents.ego_description: continuing to run across the intersection while weaving between vehicles

notable_agents.action: green sedan speeding through the intersection, passing close behind the character

entered.detail: lime green 1960s sedan with white roof passing through the crosswalk

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the center of the intersection as a green vintage sedan passes alarmingly close from behind. The white shotgun house with blue shutters grows larger on the right as the character approaches the far curb. The silver sedan exits view behind while traffic continues to flow through the wet streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with historic houses and pedestrians

events.description: character steps off the asphalt crosswalk onto the concrete sidewalk
ego transitions from running to walking pace upon reaching the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past pedestrians carrying umbrellas

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking with umbrellas along the sidewalk

entered.detail: wet concrete sidewalk with visible cracks and texture
pedestrians carrying dark umbrellas to shield from rain

segments.scene_description: Having successfully crossed the street, the character steps onto the concrete sidewalk and slows to a walking pace. The camera follows along the historic residential street, passing pedestrians carrying umbrellas. The white shotgun house with blue shutters now dominates the right side of the frame as the character proceeds along the wet pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character navigates a rainy urban intersection at dusk, transitioning from a frantic dash through traffic to a steady walk along a residential sidewalk. It begins with the character running across white crosswalk lines on a wet multi-lane street, dodging a silver vintage sedan and a rapidly approaching green car. As the character pushes through the center of the intersection, the green sedan passes alarmingly close from behind while a white shotgun house with blue shutters grows larger on the right. The scene then shifts as the character reaches the far curb and steps onto the concrete sidewalk, slowing to a walking pace. Finally, the camera follows the character past pedestrians with umbrellas, with the historic white house now dominating the frame against the backdrop of the wet pavement.
